author: Gaohan123
body: Is it for sure that the first prompt is the parent prompt? I think we should add some check or comments

author: Celeste-jq
body: Yes. _forward_to_next_stage explicitly constructs the bridge input as [output, *companion_outputs], where output is the parent request output. I’ll document this ordering contract next to the indexing. A runtime check in this bridge would require duplicating/passing additional request identity state, so a focused comment is more appropriate here.
